title: Increase the limit on the number of statuses per column
excerpt: I would like to create status column with a status for each state. This is currently prohibited since the limit of statuses for one column is only 40. Please increase the limit to at least 50.

posts.author: Simonga25 (George Simon)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create status column with a status for each state. This is currently prohibited since the limit of statuses for one column is only 40. Please increase the limit to at least 50.

posts.author: Queendev (Yaxal)
posts.cookedHtml: I need about 150 of them so I totally support this increase, maybe an option to not have colors so that is not a problem.

posts.author: Fraz1994 (Fraser)
posts.cookedHtml:
100% - i need 100 to be safe as we track time against each of our clients

Still no update after 2 years?

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a view that I group by week, and the limitation falls short of 52. If I group by text field, it doesn’t keep the order I need it in (it orders by order on the main table, not the order by number or date)

Agree with above, it would be great to have a status option that is not limited by the number of colors.

posts.author: adamfowler (Adam Fowler)
posts.cookedHtml: We built out an inventory tracking using Vloopkup, only to get to the end and realize the link via status column does not work due to the 40 max limit. We will have several hundred items that need tracked.

posts.author: Fraz1994 (Fraser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has there been no reply from the Monday team for this?

I think they should at least give a ‘not in the foreseeable’ so we have some kind of update.
